weekly_plan.nutrition_suggestion: High-protein breakfast: Scrambled eggs with spinach and whole-grain toast.
weekly_plan.recovery_tip: Focus on deep breathing during stretches to lower cortisol levels.

weekly_plan.nutrition_suggestion: Post-workout: Greek yogurt with berries and a handful of almonds.
weekly_plan.recovery_tip: Hydrate well; aim for at least 3 liters of water today.

weekly_plan.nutrition_suggestion: Increase fiber intake today with a large green salad for lunch.
weekly_plan.recovery_tip: Try a contrast shower (alternating warm and cold) to boost circulation.

weekly_plan.nutrition_suggestion: Dinner: Grilled chicken or tofu with quinoa and steamed broccoli.
weekly_plan.recovery_tip: Prioritize 7-8 hours of sleep for muscle repair.

weekly_plan.nutrition_suggestion: Mid-day snack: Apple slices with 1 tbsp peanut butter.
weekly_plan.recovery_tip: Use a foam roller or tennis ball to massage any sore spots.

weekly_plan.nutrition_suggestion: Protein-rich lunch: Tuna or chickpea salad wrap.
weekly_plan.recovery_tip: Gentle stretching before bed to improve sleep quality.

weekly_plan.nutrition_suggestion: Focus on whole foods; avoid processed sugars today.
weekly_plan.recovery_tip: Plan your next week's schedule to stay consistent.

meals.breakfast: Oatmeal with whey protein, almond milk, and half a banana.
meals.lunch: Grilled chicken breast, 1 cup brown rice, and mixed roasted vegetables.
meals.snack: A boiled egg and an orange.
meals.dinner: Baked salmon or lean steak with sweet potato and asparagus.
